title: Charodiy #2733
definition:
Harodite = see Harod "trembling"

 1) a resident or descendant of Harod otherwise unknown; two of
    David's 37 guards, Shammah and Elika, called Harodites
nasbUsage:

 1) a resident or descendant of Harod otherwise unknown; two of
